title: gymnorebutia neocumingii subsp. trollii
intro: Gymnorebutia neocumingii subsp. trollii, also known as Gymnocalycium neocumingii subsp. trollii, is a rare and exotic species of cactus that belongs to the genus Gymnocalycium, characterized by its vibrant yellow flowers and globular shape. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gymnocalycium neocumingii subsp. trollii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use should be carefully supervised due to potential side effects.
